short_description: Germany-origin dual-use exports require BAFA/EU Dual-Use classification and licence screening.
description: Exports from Germany of dual-use goods, software, and technology must be screened against EU Regulation 2021/821, the German Export List, embargo rules, and BAFA licensing requirements. Electronics, batteries, power electronics, semiconductor equipment, and controlled technology should be classified before shipment.
content_en: Germany-origin exports of dual-use goods, software, and technology must be screened against EU Regulation 2021/821, the German Export List, embargo rules, and BAFA licensing requirements.
content_zh: 德国原产出口的两用物项、软件和技术应依据欧盟两用物项条例、德国出口清单、禁运规则和 BAFA 许可要求进行分类和许可证筛查。

checklist.id: Technical classification::Check BAFA/EU dual-use classification
checklist.desc: Map HS code, technical parameters, software, and technology against EU Dual-Use Annex I and the German Export List.

checklist.id: End-use screening::Document end-use and end-user
checklist.desc: Collect end-use statement, consignee details, and sanctions/restricted-party screening evidence before export.

checklist.id: License decision::Confirm BAFA licence or general authorisation path
checklist.task: Confirm BAFA licence or general authorisation path
checklist.desc: If listed or red-flagged, confirm whether a BAFA individual licence, Union General Export Authorisation, or no-licence decision is available.

short_description: Germany-bound electrical and radio equipment requires CE, EU economic-operator, and market-surveillance readiness.
description: Electrical and radio equipment placed on the German market should be checked for CE/RED/EMC/LVD/RoHS evidence, responsible EU economic operator information, German-language instructions where required, and battery or WEEE obligations for electronics and energy products.
content_en: Germany-bound electrical and radio equipment should be checked for CE/RED/EMC/LVD/RoHS evidence, responsible EU economic operator information, and product documentation before import or placement on the market.
content_zh: 进入德国市场的电子和无线设备应检查 CE/RED/EMC/LVD/RoHS 资料、欧盟责任经营者信息、产品说明和电池/WEEE 等义务。

checklist.id: Product evidence::Prepare CE/RED/EMC/LVD/RoHS technical file
checklist.desc: Collect EU declaration of conformity, test reports, labels, user instructions, and importer/responsible-person details.

checklist.id: Market access::Check German WEEE and battery obligations
checklist.task: Check German WEEE and battery obligations
checklist.desc: Confirm producer registration, take-back, and battery documentation for electronic or energy-storage products.

checklist.id: Border readiness::Screen radio and electrical safety risks
checklist.task: Screen radio and electrical safety risks
checklist.desc: Verify frequency bands, chargers, batteries, and live-part safety before placing goods on the German market.

short_description: Netherlands export, transit, or transfer of strategic goods may require CDIU notification or licensing.
description: Exports or transit from the Netherlands involving military goods, dual-use goods, controlled software, or controlled technology should be screened under Dutch strategic-goods controls. Companies may need to notify or apply to Customs’ Central Import and Export Office (CDIU).
content_en: Netherlands-origin export, transit, or technology transfer of strategic goods may require CDIU notification or licensing under Dutch strategic-goods controls.
content_zh: 从荷兰出口、转运或转移战略物项、两用物项、受控软件或技术时，可能需要向 CDIU 通知或申请许可证。

checklist.id: Classification::Check Dutch strategic-goods status
checklist.desc: Review whether the product, software, technology, transit, or brokering activity falls under Dutch/EU strategic-goods controls.

checklist.id: Licence path::Confirm CDIU notification or licence requirement
checklist.task: Confirm CDIU notification or licence requirement
checklist.desc: Document CDIU advice, notification, licence application, or no-licence rationale before export or transit.

checklist.id: End-use controls::Screen destination and end-use
checklist.desc: Retain end-use statements and restricted-party screening for sensitive electronics or semiconductor routes.

short_description: Advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment exported from the Netherlands may require national authorisation.
description: The Netherlands has national authorisation requirements for certain advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and related technology exported to destinations outside the EU. Semiconductor tooling, measuring, inspection, lithography, and related controlled technologies should be screened before shipment.
content_en: Certain advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and related technology exported from the Netherlands to destinations outside the EU are subject to a national authorisation requirement.
content_zh: 从荷兰向欧盟以外出口特定先进半导体制造设备及相关技术时，可能适用荷兰国家授权要求。

checklist.id: Technical classification::Screen semiconductor tooling scope
checklist.desc: Check whether lithography, measuring, inspection, or related technology is covered by Dutch national semiconductor export-control measures.

checklist.id: Authorisation::Confirm national export authorisation
checklist.desc: If covered, prepare the Dutch authorisation application and destination/end-use evidence before shipment.

short_description: Singapore export, transhipment, transit, brokering, or transfer of strategic goods requires SGCA permit screening.
description: Singapore controls strategic goods and technology under its Strategic Goods Control framework. Export, transhipment, transit, brokering, intangible transfer, or technology transfer involving controlled electronics, semiconductors, encryption, or dual-use items should be screened for permit and registration requirements.
content_en: Singapore exports, transhipments, transits, brokering, and transfers involving strategic goods or technology should be screened for Strategic Goods Control permit and registration requirements.
content_zh: 新加坡对战略物项和技术实施管制；出口、转运、过境、经纪、无形转移或技术转移均应筛查许可证和注册要求。

checklist.id: Permit screening::Check SGCA permit and registration needs
checklist.task: Check SGCA permit and registration needs
checklist.desc: Screen export, transhipment, transit, brokering, and technology-transfer activities against Singapore strategic-goods controls.

checklist.id: Documentation::Prepare TradeNet and end-use evidence
checklist.desc: Retain product classification, end-use, consignee, and permit documentation for controlled electronics or semiconductor routes.

short_description: Singapore import certificate / delivery verification may apply to strategic goods imported for declared end-use.
description: Singapore’s Import Certificate and Delivery Verification process may apply where a foreign exporting country requires assurance for strategic goods. Importers must obtain the import permit via TradeNet, declare the ICDV number and quantities, upload required documents, and obtain written approval before re-exporting ICDV goods.
content_en: Singapore ICDV may apply to strategic goods imported for declared end-use, with import permit, document upload, delivery verification, and re-export approval obligations.
content_zh: 新加坡 ICDV 可能适用于战略物项进口；进口商需通过 TradeNet 办理进口许可证、申报 ICDV 信息、上传单证，并在再出口前取得书面批准。

checklist.id: Import certificate::Confirm ICDV requirement
checklist.desc: If the exporter or foreign authority requires ICDV, obtain Singapore Import Certificate before shipment.

checklist.id: Permit filing::Upload import documents in TradeNet
checklist.desc: Declare ICDV number, quantities, invoice, airway bill/bill of lading, packing list, and approved ICDV in the import permit.

checklist.id: Re-export control::Do not re-export ICDV goods without approval
checklist.task: Do not re-export ICDV goods without approval
checklist.desc: Confirm Customs written approval before re-exporting goods imported under an Import Certificate.

short_description: Mexico-bound electronic equipment may require NOM safety certification before import or sale.
description: Imports into Mexico of electronic, electrical, power-supply, charger, battery, and smart hardware products should be checked for mandatory NOM compliance, including NOM-001-SCFI-2018 safety requirements for electronic equipment where applicable.
content_en: Mexico-bound electronic and electrical products may require mandatory NOM compliance and certification before import or sale, including NOM-001-SCFI-2018 where applicable.
content_zh: 进入墨西哥的电子、电气、电源、充电器、电池和智能硬件产品，应检查适用的强制性 NOM 合规和认证要求。
source_citation: Secretaría de Economía / SNICE NOM guidance

checklist.id: NOM scope::Check mandatory NOM coverage by HS code
checklist.task: Check mandatory NOM coverage by HS code
checklist.desc: Confirm whether the product falls under NOM-001-SCFI-2018 or another mandatory NOM before import.

checklist.id: Certification::Prepare NOM certificate and test evidence
checklist.task: Prepare NOM certificate and test evidence
checklist.desc: Collect accredited lab reports, certificate, Spanish labels, and importer documentation required for customs clearance.

checklist.id: Labeling::Check Spanish commercial information
checklist.desc: Verify product marking, safety warnings, voltage/frequency, importer details, and packaging labels before sale.

short_description: Mexico import entry requires HS classification, customs documentation, and NOM evidence where the tariff line is covered.
description: Mexican customs entry should confirm HS classification, valuation, importer registration, NOM applicability, and supporting documents. If a tariff line is subject to a mandatory NOM, the importer should be ready to demonstrate compliance at or before importation.
content_en: Mexico import entry should confirm HS classification, valuation, importer registration, NOM applicability, and supporting documents for covered tariff lines.
content_zh: 墨西哥进口申报应确认 HS 分类、完税价格、进口商资质、NOM 适用性和支持单证；若税号受强制 NOM 管理，应准备合规证明。

checklist.id: Entry data::Confirm Mexican HS and valuation data
checklist.task: Confirm Mexican HS and valuation data
checklist.desc: Align invoice, packing list, importer registration, HS code, origin, and customs valuation before entry.

checklist.id: NOM evidence::Attach NOM evidence if required
checklist.desc: If the tariff line is covered by a NOM, prepare certificate, exemption support, or applicable compliance document for customs.

short_description: US-bound radiofrequency devices require FCC equipment authorization and labeling review before marketing or import.
description: Radiofrequency devices marketed, imported, or sold in the United States should be checked for FCC equipment authorization, technical labeling, responsible-party information, user instructions, and supplier declaration or certification pathway before shipment.
content_en: US-bound RF and digital devices should be checked for FCC equipment authorization, labeling, responsible-party information, and technical compliance evidence before import or marketing.
content_zh: 进入美国市场的射频和数字设备应检查 FCC 设备授权、标签、责任方信息和技术合规资料。

checklist.id: FCC scope::Classify RF or digital device pathway
checklist.task: Classify RF or digital device pathway
checklist.desc: Confirm whether the device is intentional radiator, unintentional radiator, or exempt accessory and identify certification or SDoC route.

checklist.id: FCC evidence::Prepare test report and label
checklist.desc: Keep FCC test report, FCC ID or SDoC statement, user manual notices, and responsible-party information ready before marketing.

checklist.id: Import readiness::Align product model and grantee data
checklist.task: Align product model and grantee data
checklist.desc: Check model number, module integration, antenna changes, and grantee/responsible-party information against the shipment documents.

short_description: US-bound lithium battery products should be screened for CPSC safety and recall exposure.
description: Consumer products containing lithium-ion batteries, power banks, chargers, e-bikes, scooters, and energy-storage accessories entering the United States should be checked for CPSC safety guidance, applicable voluntary standards, overheating/fire risk, labeling, and recall history.
content_en: US-bound lithium battery consumer products should be checked for CPSC safety guidance, overheating/fire risk, labeling, voluntary standards, and recall exposure.
content_zh: 进入美国的锂电池消费品应检查 CPSC 安全指南、过热/火灾风险、标签、适用标准和召回风险。

checklist.id: Safety scope::Check CPSC recall and hazard history
checklist.task: Check CPSC recall and hazard history
checklist.desc: Search CPSC recalls for the product type, battery pack, charger, and model family before shipment.

checklist.id: Battery evidence::Collect battery safety documents
checklist.desc: Prepare cell/pack specifications, charger compatibility data, UN38.3, safety test reports, and warnings for lithium products.

checklist.id: Labeling::Verify consumer warnings and instructions
checklist.desc: Confirm English warnings, charging instructions, manufacturer/importer data, and disposal information before sale.

short_description: EU-bound consumer electronics require GPSR product-safety and Safety Gate recall exposure review.
description: Consumer electronics, chargers, batteries, smart hardware, and connected devices placed on the EU market should be checked for General Product Safety Regulation obligations, traceability, responsible economic operator, warnings/instructions, and Safety Gate alert exposure.
content_en: EU-bound consumer electronics should be checked for GPSR product-safety obligations, traceability, responsible economic operator, warnings, and Safety Gate alert exposure.
content_zh: 进入欧盟市场的消费电子应检查 GPSR 产品安全、可追溯性、责任经营者、警示说明和 Safety Gate 风险。

checklist.id: GPSR scope::Check product safety and traceability
checklist.desc: Confirm EU responsible economic operator, traceability data, safety warnings, instructions, and product-risk assessment.

checklist.id: Safety Gate::Search alert exposure
checklist.desc: Review Safety Gate alerts for similar chargers, battery products, wireless devices, or child-accessible electronics.

checklist.id: Technical file::Align CE and GPSR files
checklist.desc: Ensure CE/RED/EMC/LVD/RoHS evidence and GPSR safety documentation tell the same product story.

short_description: EU-bound batteries and battery-powered products require EU Battery Regulation and EPR review.
description: Batteries, battery packs, energy storage systems, EV chargers with battery modules, and battery-powered electronics placed on the EU market should be checked for EU Battery Regulation obligations, CE marking where applicable, labeling, producer responsibility, due diligence, and documentation requirements.
content_en: EU-bound batteries and battery-powered products should be checked for EU Battery Regulation obligations, labeling, producer responsibility, due diligence, and documentation requirements.
content_zh: 进入欧盟市场的电池和含电池产品应检查欧盟电池法规、标签、生产者责任、尽职调查和技术文件要求。

checklist.id: Battery scope::Classify battery category
checklist.desc: Identify portable, industrial, EV, LMT, or SLI battery category and map applicable EU obligations.

checklist.id: EPR::Confirm producer responsibility
checklist.desc: Confirm EU producer registration, take-back, labeling, and waste-battery documentation for the target member state.

checklist.id: Technical file::Prepare battery documentation
checklist.desc: Collect battery chemistry, capacity, safety test evidence, carbon/due-diligence data where applicable, and declaration documents.

short_description: Mexico-bound consumer electronics should be checked for Spanish commercial-information and safety labeling obligations.
description: Consumer electronics, chargers, batteries, and smart devices imported into Mexico should be checked for Spanish commercial information, importer details, warnings, NOM evidence, warranty/manual requirements, and product-specific safety labeling before customs clearance and sale.
content_en: Mexico-bound consumer electronics should be checked for Spanish commercial information, importer details, warnings, NOM evidence, warranty/manual requirements, and product-specific labeling.
content_zh: 进入墨西哥的消费电子应检查西班牙语商业信息、进口商信息、警示、NOM 证明、保修/说明书和产品标签。
source_citation: PROFECO / Secretaría de Economía NOM consumer information guidance

checklist.id: Labeling scope::Confirm Spanish label and manual
checklist.desc: Prepare Spanish commercial information, importer details, warnings, warranty, and user manual content before sale.

checklist.id: NOM evidence::Align label with NOM certificate
checklist.desc: Ensure model names, electrical ratings, importer data, and NOM certificates match the goods and invoice.

short_description: Germany-bound electrical and electronic equipment requires ElektroG/WEEE registration and take-back readiness.
description: Electrical and electronic equipment placed on the German market should be checked for ElektroG/WEEE producer registration with stiftung ear, authorised representative obligations for foreign producers, WEEE symbol, take-back/recycling duties, annual reporting, and battery-removability information where applicable.
content_en: Germany-bound EEE should be checked for ElektroG/WEEE registration with stiftung ear, authorised representative obligations, WEEE symbol, take-back/recycling duties, reporting, and battery-removability data.
content_zh: 进入德国市场的电子电气设备应检查 ElektroG/WEEE 注册、stiftung ear、授权代表、WEEE 标识、回收义务、年度报告和电池可拆卸信息。
source_citation: Umweltbundesamt / BMUV ElektroG and stiftung ear

checklist.id: ElektroG scope::Confirm EEE category and producer role
checklist.task: Confirm EEE category and producer role
checklist.desc: Determine whether the product is EEE and whether the exporter/importer is the first party placing it on the German market.

checklist.id: stiftung ear::Check registration or authorised representative
checklist.desc: Confirm stiftung ear registration or authorised representative setup before shipment or online sale to Germany.

checklist.id: WEEE evidence::Prepare label and recycling documents
checklist.desc: Verify WEEE symbol, take-back information, battery removability, and reporting data for German market placement.

short_description: Germany-bound batteries and battery-powered products require German battery producer-responsibility review.
description: Batteries, accumulators, battery packs, power banks, energy storage systems, and products containing batteries placed on the German market should be checked for BattDG/Battery Regulation obligations, stiftung ear battery registration, producer responsibility organisation participation, take-back, labeling, and documentation requirements.
content_en: Germany-bound batteries and battery-powered products should be checked for BattDG/EU Battery Regulation obligations, stiftung ear registration, producer responsibility, take-back, labeling, and documentation.
content_zh: 进入德国市场的电池和含电池产品应检查 BattDG/欧盟电池法规、stiftung ear 注册、生产者责任组织、回收、标签和技术文件要求。
source_citation: Umweltbundesamt BattDG / stiftung ear battery obligations

checklist.id: Battery category::Classify battery type
checklist.desc: Identify whether the product contains portable, industrial, LMT, EV, or other battery categories and map German obligations.

checklist.id: Registration::Confirm stiftung ear battery registration
checklist.desc: Check whether a German battery producer registration or authorised representative is required before market placement.

checklist.id: Take-back::Prepare take-back and labeling evidence
checklist.desc: Prepare battery labeling, collection/take-back participation, safety and chemical documentation, and reporting data.

short_description: Germany-bound packaged goods may require Packaging Act/LUCID registration and system participation.
description: Goods sold or shipped into Germany with sales, transport, or product packaging should be checked for VerpackG obligations, LUCID packaging-register status, system participation, data reporting, and packaging-weight records. This is especially relevant for direct-to-consumer electronics and replacement parts.
content_en: Germany-bound packaged goods should be checked for VerpackG/LUCID registration, system participation, data reporting, and packaging-weight records.
content_zh: 发往德国的带包装商品应检查 VerpackG/LUCID 注册、回收系统参与、数据申报和包装重量记录。

checklist.id: Packaging scope::Check LUCID registration need
checklist.desc: Confirm whether sales packaging, shipment packaging, or direct-to-consumer sales trigger German Packaging Act obligations.

checklist.id: System participation::Prepare packaging records
checklist.desc: Keep packaging material weights, system participation records, LUCID registration number, and annual data reporting support.

short_description: Netherlands-bound electrical and electronic equipment requires WEEE/EPR registration and reporting review.
description: Electrical and electronic devices produced, imported, sold, or directly supplied to Dutch end users should be checked for Dutch WEEE/EPR obligations, registration/reporting, WEEE symbol, collection/recycling duties, battery removability information, and Stichting OPEN or relevant scheme participation.
content_en: Netherlands-bound EEE should be checked for WEEE/EPR obligations, registration/reporting, WEEE symbol, collection/recycling duties, battery removability information, and relevant scheme participation.
content_zh: 进入荷兰市场的电子电气设备应检查 WEEE/EPR、注册/报告、WEEE 标识、回收义务、电池可拆卸信息和相关组织参与。
source_citation: Business.gov.nl electrical and electronic equipment EPR

checklist.id: WEEE scope::Confirm Dutch producer responsibility
checklist.desc: Check whether the company first markets, imports, or sells EEE directly to Dutch end users.

checklist.id: Registration::Prepare EPR registration and reporting
checklist.desc: Prepare registration, reporting, WEEE symbol, battery removability and recycling documentation.

short_description: Netherlands-bound batteries and battery-containing products require Dutch battery EPR review.
description: Batteries, accumulators, battery packs, power banks, energy-storage products, and products containing batteries placed on the Dutch market should be checked for Dutch battery EPR, collection/recycling, notification, take-back, consumer information, and reporting obligations.
content_en: Netherlands-bound batteries and battery-containing products should be checked for Dutch battery EPR, collection/recycling, notification, take-back, consumer information, and reporting obligations.
content_zh: 进入荷兰市场的电池及含电池产品应检查电池 EPR、收集回收、通知、回收、消费者信息和报告义务。

checklist.id: Battery EPR::Confirm first-market role
checklist.desc: Check whether the importer, brand owner, trader, or foreign seller has Dutch battery EPR obligations.

checklist.id: Battery reporting::Prepare collection and consumer information
checklist.desc: Prepare notification/reporting data, take-back arrangements, consumer information, and battery documentation.

short_description: Netherlands-bound packaged goods may trigger packaging waste contribution and annual reporting obligations.
description: Importers or producers placing packaging material on the Dutch market should check packaging waste management contribution thresholds, Verpact registration, annual packaging-weight reporting, and indirect export refund records, especially for electronics and spare parts shipped in consumer packaging.
content_en: Netherlands-bound packaged goods may trigger packaging waste contribution, Verpact registration, annual packaging-weight reporting, and indirect export refund records.
content_zh: 进入荷兰市场的带包装商品可能触发包装废弃物缴费、Verpact 注册、年度包装重量申报和间接出口退费记录要求。

checklist.id: Packaging threshold::Check Dutch packaging threshold
checklist.desc: Confirm whether packaging quantities exceed the Dutch contribution/reporting threshold and whether Verpact registration is required.

checklist.id: Records::Keep packaging-weight records
checklist.desc: Maintain packaging material, quantity, annual report, contribution, and indirect export refund evidence where relevant.

short_description: Singapore-bound telecom and wireless equipment require IMDA import and equipment-registration review.
description: Telecommunication equipment imported into Singapore should be screened for IMDA dealer licensing, equipment registration before local sale or hire, TradeNet permit declarations, AHTN/product-code requirements, prohibited-equipment prior approval, and compliance-label obligations.
content_en: Singapore-bound telecom and wireless equipment should be screened for IMDA dealer licensing, equipment registration, TradeNet permit declarations, prior approval for prohibited equipment, and compliance-label obligations.
content_zh: 进入新加坡的电信和无线设备应检查 IMDA 经销商许可、设备注册、TradeNet 申报、禁止设备预先批准和合规标签要求。
source_citation: IMDA Requirement for Import of Telecommunication Equipment

checklist.id: IMDA scope::Confirm telecom equipment registration path
checklist.desc: Check whether the product connects to telecom networks, uses radio spectrum, or falls under IMDA equipment-registration classes.

checklist.id: TradeNet::Check AHTN and product-code declaration
checklist.desc: Confirm AHTN code, IMDA product code, dealer licence, and prior approval need before import declaration.

checklist.id: Labeling::Prepare IMDA compliance label evidence
checklist.desc: Verify equipment registration record, compliance label, model number, and user documentation before local sale or hire.

short_description: Singapore-controlled household electrical and electronic products may require SAFETY Mark registration before sale.
description: Controlled goods under Singapore Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations should be checked for CPSO/Enterprise Singapore registration, valid SAFETY Mark, accredited test report, model coverage, supplier obligations, and online listing compliance before import or sale.
content_en: Singapore controlled goods should be checked for CPSO/Enterprise Singapore registration, valid SAFETY Mark, accredited test report, model coverage, supplier obligations, and online listing compliance.
content_zh: 新加坡受控商品应检查 CPSO/Enterprise Singapore 注册、SAFETY Mark、认可测试报告、型号覆盖、供应商义务和线上销售合规。
source_citation: Singapore Consumer Product Safety Regulations / CPSO

checklist.id: Controlled goods::Check SAFETY Mark scope
checklist.desc: Confirm whether the product is a controlled good requiring registration and SAFETY Mark before sale in Singapore.

checklist.id: Registration::Prepare registered supplier and test evidence
checklist.task: Prepare registered supplier and test evidence
checklist.desc: Collect registered supplier details, valid test report, certificate, model list, and SAFETY Mark artwork.

checklist.id: Online sale::Review marketplace listing compliance
checklist.desc: Make sure online listings show correct model, registration status, warnings, and SAFETY Mark where required.

short_description: Wi-Fi routers sold in Singapore require CSA Cybersecurity Labelling Scheme review in addition to IMDA registration.
description: Wi-Fi routers intended for local sale or use in Singapore should be checked for IMDA TS RG-SEC and CSA Cybersecurity Labelling Scheme Level 1 minimum requirements, cybersecurity label, equipment registration, software/security update commitments, and consumer-facing security information.
content_en: Wi-Fi routers sold in Singapore should be checked for IMDA TS RG-SEC and CSA Cybersecurity Labelling Scheme Level 1 minimum requirements, cybersecurity label, equipment registration, and security update commitments.
content_zh: 在新加坡销售的 Wi-Fi 路由器应检查 IMDA TS RG-SEC、CSA Cybersecurity Labelling Scheme Level 1、网络安全标签、设备注册和安全更新承诺。
source_citation: Cyber Security Agency of Singapore CLS registration

checklist.id: CLS scope::Confirm Wi-Fi router CLS requirement
checklist.desc: Check whether the device is a Wi-Fi router sold for local use and subject to CSA CLS / IMDA TS RG-SEC.

checklist.id: Cybersecurity evidence::Prepare CLS submission data
checklist.desc: Prepare product security information, firmware update policy, default password controls, vulnerability handling process, and label evidence.

short_description: Singapore-bound energy storage systems require SCDF Fire Code and installation-safety review.
description: Energy storage systems, battery rooms, and large lithium battery installations for Singapore should be checked for SCDF Fire Code requirements, setback/compartmentation, fire protection, certification, installation approval, operation and maintenance controls, and site-specific fire-safety assessment.
content_en: Singapore-bound ESS and battery-room installations should be checked for SCDF Fire Code requirements, setback/compartmentation, fire protection, certification, installation approval, O&M controls, and site-specific fire-safety assessment.
content_zh: 进入新加坡的储能系统和电池房安装应检查 SCDF Fire Code、间距/防火分隔、消防保护、认证、安装批准、运维控制和现场消防评估。
source_citation: Singapore MHA / SCDF Fire Safety Requirements for ESS

checklist.id: ESS scope::Confirm SCDF Fire Code applicability
checklist.desc: Identify ESS capacity, chemistry, indoor/outdoor installation, battery-room layout, and Fire Code trigger points.

checklist.id: Site approval::Prepare fire-safety design evidence
checklist.desc: Prepare certification, fire protection design, setback/compartment details, emergency response and O&M procedures.

short_description: Mexico-bound telecom, radio, and wireless equipment require IFT homologation and IFT mark review.
description: Products, equipment, devices, or apparatus for telecommunications or broadcasting that connect to a telecommunications network or use radio spectrum in Mexico should be checked for IFT homologation certificate, conformity assessment, technical provisions, homologation number, Sello IFT marking, importer use of the mark, and certificate validity.
content_en: Mexico-bound telecom, radio, and wireless equipment should be checked for IFT homologation certificate, conformity assessment, technical provisions, homologation number, Sello IFT marking, importer mark use, and certificate validity.
content_zh: 进入墨西哥的电信、广播、无线和射频设备应检查 IFT homologation 证书、符合性评估、技术规定、 homologation 编号、Sello IFT 标识、进口商使用标识和证书有效性。
source_citation: IFT Homologación y Evaluación de la Conformidad

checklist.id: IFT scope::Confirm telecom/radio homologation trigger
checklist.desc: Check whether the product connects to telecom networks or uses radio spectrum and requires IFT homologation.

checklist.id: Certificate::Prepare homologation certificate and mark
checklist.desc: Verify certificate holder, model list, technical provision, homologation number, Sello IFT marking, and importer use of the mark.

short_description: Mexico-bound electronic, electrical, and household products require NOM-024 commercial-information review.
description: Electronic, electrical, and household appliance products imported into Mexico should be checked for NOM-024-SCFI commercial-information requirements covering packaging, instructions, warranty, importer/manufacturer details, model identification, electrical ratings, warnings, and Spanish-language consumer information.
content_en: Mexico-bound electronic, electrical, and household appliance products should be checked for NOM-024-SCFI commercial-information requirements covering packaging, instructions, warranty, importer/manufacturer details, model identification, ratings, warnings, and Spanish-language consumer information.
content_zh: 进入墨西哥的电子、电气和家电产品应检查 NOM-024-SCFI 商业信息要求，包括包装、说明书、保修、进口商/制造商信息、型号、电气参数、警示和西班牙语消费者信息。

checklist.id: NOM-024 scope::Confirm commercial information requirement
checklist.desc: Check whether packaging, instructions, warranty, and consumer information must follow NOM-024-SCFI.

checklist.id: Spanish evidence::Prepare label/manual/warranty package
checklist.desc: Prepare Spanish labels, manual, warranty, importer/manufacturer details, model data, ratings, and warnings before import or sale.

short_description: Mexico import entries require TIGIE tariff classification and NICO statistical suffix review.
description: Imports into Mexico should confirm TIGIE tariff fraction, NICO statistical code, HS classification support, applicable NOM/IFT restrictions, importer registry status, valuation, origin, and customs-document consistency before filing the pedimento.
content_en: Mexico import entries should confirm TIGIE tariff fraction, NICO statistical code, HS support, applicable NOM/IFT restrictions, importer registry, valuation, origin, and customs-document consistency before filing the pedimento.
content_zh: 墨西哥进口申报应确认 TIGIE 税号、NICO 统计代码、HS 分类依据、适用 NOM/IFT 限制、进口商登记、完税价格、原产地和单证一致性。
source_citation: SNICE / ANAM import and tariff classification guidance

checklist.id: Tariff line::Confirm TIGIE and NICO code
checklist.desc: Validate Mexican tariff fraction and NICO suffix against product specs, BOM, and customs broker classification support.

checklist.id: Pedimento::Align customs entry data
checklist.desc: Align invoice, origin, valuation, importer registry, applicable NOM/IFT controls, and pedimento data before entry.

short_description: Japan-bound wireless and radio equipment require MIC Radio Law technical conformity review.
description: Wireless, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and radio equipment imported or marketed in Japan should be checked for Radio Law technical regulations conformity certification, construction design certification where applicable, Giteki mark display, model coverage, antenna/radio module conditions, and importer documentation.
content_en: Japan-bound wireless and radio equipment should be checked for MIC Radio Law technical conformity certification, Giteki mark display, model coverage, antenna/module conditions, and importer documentation.
content_zh: 进入日本市场的无线和射频设备应检查 MIC Radio Law 技术基准适合证明、技适标志、型号覆盖、天线/无线模块条件和进口商文件。
source_citation: MIC Japan Radio Use / Technical Regulations Conformity Certification

checklist.id: Radio scope::Confirm Radio Law conformity trigger
checklist.desc: Check whether the product includes Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, or other radio transmitters subject to MIC technical regulations.

checklist.id: Giteki evidence::Prepare mark and certificate coverage
checklist.desc: Verify certificate holder, model list, module/antenna conditions, Giteki mark placement, user manual notes, and importer records.

short_description: Japan-bound electrical appliances, chargers, adapters, and lithium-ion batteries may require PSE review.
description: Electrical appliances and materials imported or sold in Japan should be checked under METI Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act requirements for PSE marking, specified/non-specified product category, conformity assessment, importer notification, inspection records, labels, and lithium-ion battery coverage where applicable.
content_en: Japan-bound electrical appliances, chargers, adapters, and lithium-ion batteries should be checked for PSE marking, conformity assessment, importer notification, inspection records, and labels.
content_zh: 进入日本市场的电气产品、充电器、适配器和锂离子电池应检查 PSE 标志、符合性评估、进口商备案、检查记录和标签要求。
source_citation: METI Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act / PSE
related_keywords: electrical appliance and material safety act

checklist.id: PSE scope::Classify specified or non-specified product
checklist.desc: Confirm whether the electrical product, charger, adapter, or lithium-ion battery falls under PSE categories.

checklist.id: Importer records::Prepare conformity and marking evidence
checklist.desc: Collect conformity assessment, inspection records, importer notification evidence, PSE mark artwork, ratings, warnings, and manuals.

short_description: Japan import entries require tariff classification, customs valuation, and import declaration consistency.
description: Imports into Japan should confirm HS/tariff classification, customs valuation, origin, invoice and packing-list consistency, NACCS/import declaration data, and whether the tariff line triggers product-specific PSE, Radio Law, battery, or other import controls.
content_en: Japan import entries should confirm tariff classification, customs valuation, origin, NACCS/import declaration data, and product-specific PSE or Radio Law triggers.
content_zh: 日本进口申报应确认税号分类、完税价格、原产地、NACCS/进口申报数据，以及是否触发 PSE、Radio Law、电池等产品准入要求。
source_citation: Japan Customs tariff and import procedures

checklist.id: Tariff line::Confirm Japan tariff classification
checklist.desc: Validate HS/tariff code against product specifications, components, function, and customs broker classification support.

checklist.id: Declaration data::Align import declaration documents
checklist.desc: Align invoice, packing list, origin, valuation, importer data, and product-specific control evidence before filing.

short_description: Korea-bound wireless and broadcasting/communications equipment require RRA conformity assessment review.
description: Wireless, radio, telecom, and broadcasting/communications equipment imported or sold in Korea should be checked for RRA conformity assessment, KC mark, model coverage, radio module conditions, electromagnetic compatibility, test reports, and labeling before market placement.
content_en: Korea-bound wireless and communications equipment should be checked for RRA conformity assessment, KC mark, model coverage, radio module conditions, EMC test reports, and labeling.
content_zh: 进入韩国市场的无线、电信和广播通信设备应检查 RRA 适合性评价、KC 标志、型号覆盖、无线模块条件、EMC 测试报告和标签。
source_citation: Korea RRA conformity assessment for broadcasting and communications equipment

checklist.id: RRA scope::Confirm wireless conformity path
checklist.desc: Check whether the product is broadcasting/communications equipment, RF equipment, or EMC-covered device subject to RRA conformity assessment.

checklist.id: KC evidence::Prepare RRA certificate and KC label
checklist.task: Prepare RRA certificate and KC label
checklist.desc: Verify model name, test report, certificate, KC mark, Korean label/manual content, and radio module integration conditions.

short_description: Korea-bound electrical appliances, chargers, adapters, and lithium battery products may require KC safety review.
description: Electrical appliances, consumer electronics, power supplies, chargers, adapters, and lithium battery products imported or sold in Korea should be checked for KC electrical safety certification/confirmation, KATS product-safety requirements, model coverage, factory/test evidence, Korean labeling, and importer obligations.
content_en: Korea-bound electrical appliances, chargers, adapters, and lithium battery products should be checked for KC electrical safety certification or confirmation, KATS product-safety requirements, model coverage, labels, and importer obligations.
content_zh: 进入韩国市场的电气产品、充电器、适配器和锂电池产品应检查 KC 电气安全认证/确认、KATS 产品安全、型号覆盖、标签和进口商义务。

checklist.id: KC safety scope::Confirm certification or confirmation route
checklist.desc: Classify the product under Korean electrical appliance/product safety categories and identify KC certification or supplier confirmation path.

checklist.id: Korean labeling::Prepare label and importer evidence
checklist.desc: Collect certificate/test evidence, Korean labels, model list, ratings, warnings, importer data, and manual information.

short_description: Korea import entries require HS classification, customs value, origin, and UNI-PASS declaration consistency.
description: Imports into Korea should confirm HS classification, tariff and tax treatment, origin documentation, customs valuation, UNI-PASS/import declaration data, and whether product-specific KC/RRA safety or communications controls apply before clearance.
content_en: Korea import entries should confirm HS classification, customs valuation, origin, UNI-PASS/import declaration data, and product-specific KC/RRA control triggers.
content_zh: 韩国进口申报应确认 HS 分类、关税税费、原产地、完税价格、UNI-PASS/进口申报数据，以及是否触发 KC/RRA 产品准入要求。
source_citation: Korea Customs Service / UNI-PASS import clearance

checklist.id: Tariff line::Confirm Korea HS classification
checklist.desc: Validate Korean HS classification and tariff treatment against product function, specs, BOM, and broker support.

checklist.id: Declaration data::Align UNI-PASS entry data
checklist.desc: Align invoice, packing list, origin, valuation, importer data, and KC/RRA control evidence before clearance.

short_description: Vietnam-bound ICT, radio, wireless, and telecom equipment require MIC conformity and import-quality review.
description: Vietnam-bound wireless, radio, telecom, and ICT equipment should be checked for MIC/VNTA type approval or declaration of conformity, product quality inspection registration, applicable QCVN standards, frequency conditions, model coverage, Vietnamese label/manual information, and customs import documentation before market placement.
content_en: Vietnam-bound ICT and wireless equipment should be checked for MIC/VNTA type approval or declaration of conformity, product quality inspection registration, QCVN standards, frequency conditions, model coverage, labels, and import documents.
content_zh: 进入越南市场的 ICT、无线和电信设备应检查 MIC/VNTA 型式认可或符合性声明、进口产品质量检查登记、适用 QCVN、频率条件、型号覆盖、标签和进口单证。
source_citation: Vietnam MIC radio / ICT product conformity guidance

checklist.id: MIC scope::Confirm Vietnam ICT/radio conformity trigger
checklist.desc: Check whether the product contains Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, radio, or telecom functions covered by MIC/VNTA conformity routes.

checklist.id: Import quality::Prepare conformity and PQIR evidence
checklist.desc: Collect QCVN mapping, type approval or declaration of conformity, model list, frequency parameters, Vietnamese label/manual data, and import-quality registration evidence.

short_description: Vietnam electrical products may require energy-label, MEPS, safety, or import-quality review.
description: Electrical appliances, chargers, adapters, power supplies, battery chargers, and energy-using electronics shipped to Vietnam should be checked for MOIT energy labeling / MEPS where covered, applicable QCVN or product quality requirements, voltage/plug ratings, safety test reports, Vietnamese labels, and importer records.
content_en: Vietnam electrical products should be checked for MOIT energy labeling or MEPS where covered, applicable QCVN/product-quality requirements, voltage/plug ratings, test reports, Vietnamese labels, and importer records.
content_zh: 进入越南的电气产品、充电器和适配器应检查 MOIT 能效标签/MEPS、适用 QCVN/产品质量要求、电压插头、测试报告、越南语标签和进口商记录。
source_citation: Vietnam MOIT energy labeling and product quality controls

checklist.id: Electrical scope::Check Vietnam safety or energy trigger
checklist.task: Check Vietnam safety or energy trigger
checklist.desc: Confirm whether the product is a covered electrical appliance, charger, adapter, battery charger, or energy-using equipment.

checklist.id: Local approval::Prepare Vietnam energy-label or safety file
checklist.task: Prepare Vietnam energy-label or safety file
checklist.desc: Prepare safety test reports, energy-label evidence where required, importer records, voltage/plug data, and Vietnamese consumer labels.

short_description: Vietnam import entries require HS classification, valuation, origin, permit data, and declaration consistency.
description: Imports into Vietnam should confirm HS/tariff classification, customs valuation, origin, invoice and packing-list consistency, product-specific permit or certificate data, and customs declaration information before clearance.
content_en: Vietnam import entries should confirm HS/tariff classification, customs valuation, origin, invoice and packing-list consistency, product permit/certificate data, and customs declaration information.
content_zh: 越南进口申报应确认 HS/税号分类、完税价格、原产地、发票装箱单一致性、产品许可/证书信息和海关申报数据。

checklist.id: Tariff line::Confirm Vietnam HS classification
checklist.desc: Validate tariff classification against product function, components, specifications, and broker support.

checklist.id: Declaration data::Align Vietnam customs entry documents
checklist.desc: Align invoice, packing list, origin, valuation, permit or certificate data, importer data, and tax treatment before clearance.

short_description: Vietnam-bound lithium batteries, power banks, EV chargers, and ESS require battery safety, energy, and customs review.
description: Lithium batteries, power banks, battery chargers, EV chargers, solar inverters with battery interfaces, and energy storage systems shipped to Vietnam should be checked for electrical-safety or energy-efficiency triggers, battery specifications, UN38.3 and transport documents, installation conditions for ESS, and customs documentation.
content_en: Vietnam-bound lithium batteries, power banks, EV chargers, solar inverters, and ESS should be checked for electrical-safety or energy-efficiency triggers, battery specs, UN38.3 and transport documents, installation conditions, and customs records.
content_zh: 进入越南的锂电池、移动电源、EV 充电器、含电池接口逆变器和储能系统应检查电气安全/能效、UN38.3、运输文件、安装条件和清关单证。
source_citation: Vietnam MOIT energy and product safety controls

checklist.id: Battery scope::Classify Vietnam battery and ESS triggers
checklist.task: Classify Vietnam battery and ESS triggers
checklist.desc: Identify battery chemistry, capacity, charger compatibility, ESS configuration, and whether electrical-safety or energy-efficiency controls apply.

checklist.id: Safety evidence::Prepare Vietnam battery and transport file
checklist.task: Prepare Vietnam battery and transport file
checklist.desc: Collect UN38.3, battery specifications, MSDS, transport classification, electrical test reports, installation notes, and customs documents.

short_description: Malaysia-bound communications and wireless equipment require MCMC/SIRIM approval and import-permit review.
description: Malaysia-bound communications, multimedia, radio, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and telecom equipment should be checked for MCMC/SIRIM type approval, Certificate of Approval or import permit, permitted frequency band, self-labeling/MCMC label, model coverage, local importer details, and customs release evidence.
content_en: Malaysia-bound communications and wireless equipment should be checked for MCMC/SIRIM type approval, Certificate of Approval or import permit, frequency band, MCMC label, model coverage, local importer details, and customs release evidence.
content_zh: 进入马来西亚市场的通信、无线和电信设备应检查 MCMC/SIRIM 型式批准、COA/进口许可、频段、MCMC 标签、型号覆盖、本地进口商和清关文件。

checklist.id: SIRIM scope::Confirm MCMC/SIRIM approval path
checklist.desc: Check whether the product is communications, multimedia, wireless, or RF equipment subject to MCMC/SIRIM approval.

checklist.id: Import permit::Prepare COA/import-permit and label evidence
checklist.desc: Collect certificate or special approval, permitted frequency evidence, MCMC label details, model coverage, importer records, and customs permit data.

short_description: Malaysia electrical products may require Energy Commission COA, importer registration, and safety review.
description: Electrical appliances, chargers, adapters, power supplies, battery chargers, and household/office electronics shipped to Malaysia should be checked for Malaysia Energy Commission Certificate of Approval and Certificate of Registration requirements, local plug/voltage ratings, safety test reports, and consumer-facing labels.
content_en: Malaysia electrical products should be checked for Energy Commission Certificate of Approval and importer registration, voltage/plug ratings, safety test reports, and labels.
content_zh: 进入马来西亚的电气产品、充电器和适配器应检查 ST/能源委员会 COA、进口商注册、电压插头、安全测试报告和标签。
source_citation: Malaysia Energy Commission Certificate of Approval

checklist.id: Electrical scope::Check Malaysia safety trigger
checklist.desc: Confirm whether the product is a covered electrical appliance, charger, adapter, battery charger, or energy-using equipment.

checklist.id: Local approval::Prepare ST COA file
checklist.desc: Prepare safety test reports, importer registration, COA/CoR documents, voltage/plug data, and consumer labels.

short_description: Malaysia import entries require HS classification, valuation, origin, permit data, SST/LVG, and declaration consistency.
description: Imports into Malaysia should confirm HS/tariff classification, customs valuation, origin, invoice and packing-list consistency, product-specific permit or certificate data, sales tax / LVG exposure where applicable, and customs declaration information before clearance.
content_en: Malaysia import entries should confirm HS/tariff classification, customs valuation, origin, invoice and packing-list consistency, product permit/certificate data, SST/LVG tax exposure, and customs declaration information.
content_zh: 马来西亚进口申报应确认 HS/税号分类、完税价格、原产地、发票装箱单一致性、产品许可/证书信息、SST/LVG 税费和海关申报数据。

checklist.id: Tariff line::Confirm Malaysia HS classification
checklist.desc: Validate tariff classification against product function, components, specifications, and broker support.

checklist.id: Declaration data::Align Malaysia customs entry documents
checklist.desc: Align invoice, packing list, origin, valuation, permit or certificate data, importer data, and tax treatment before clearance.

short_description: Malaysia-bound lithium batteries, power banks, EV chargers, and ESS require battery safety, ST, and customs review.
description: Lithium batteries, power banks, battery chargers, EV chargers, solar inverters with battery interfaces, and energy storage systems shipped to Malaysia should be checked for Energy Commission COA/electrical-safety triggers, battery specifications, UN38.3 and transport documents, installation or fire-safety conditions for ESS, and customs documentation.
content_en: Malaysia-bound lithium batteries, power banks, EV chargers, solar inverters, and ESS should be checked for ST/electrical-safety triggers, battery specs, UN38.3 and transport documents, installation or fire-safety conditions, and customs records.
content_zh: 进入马来西亚的锂电池、移动电源、EV 充电器、含电池接口逆变器和储能系统应检查 ST/电气安全、UN38.3、运输文件、安装/消防条件和清关单证。
source_citation: Malaysia Energy Commission electrical equipment controls

checklist.id: Battery scope::Classify Malaysia battery and ESS triggers
checklist.task: Classify Malaysia battery and ESS triggers
checklist.desc: Identify battery chemistry, capacity, charger compatibility, ESS configuration, and whether electrical-safety or ST controls apply.

checklist.id: Safety evidence::Prepare Malaysia battery and transport file
checklist.task: Prepare Malaysia battery and transport file
checklist.desc: Collect UN38.3, battery specifications, MSDS, transport classification, electrical test reports, installation/fire-safety notes, and customs documents.

short_description: United States-origin exports require export-control, origin, re-export, and customs declaration review.
description: Exports from United States of electronics, wireless devices, batteries, photovoltaic products, semiconductor items, advanced computing products, and industrial equipment should be checked for export control classification, license or permit triggers, sanctions and end-use/end-user screening, origin and re-export or transshipment exposure, and outbound customs export declaration data before shipment.
content_en: United States-origin electronics and advanced-technology exports should be checked for export controls, license or permit triggers, sanctions, origin/re-export exposure, and outbound customs export declaration data.
content_zh: 从United States出口电子和先进技术产品，应检查出口管制、许可证或许可触发点、制裁筛查、原产地/再出口或转运风险，以及出口报关资料。
source_citation: US BIS Export Administration Regulations and AES export filing baseline

checklist.id: Export control::Classify item and screen destination
checklist.desc: Check export-control classification, license or permit triggers, restricted parties, sanctions exposure, and end-use/end-user red flags.

checklist.id: Origin / re-export::Document origin and controlled content
checklist.desc: Keep origin, bill-of-materials, controlled-content, re-export, transshipment, and customer-routing evidence aligned with the shipment route.

checklist.id: Export customs::Prepare outbound declaration data
checklist.desc: Align HS classification, invoice value, origin, license/permit numbers, exporter records, consignee/end-user data, and export declaration fields.

short_description: MOFCOM announced a preliminary affirmative determination in an anti-dumping investigation covering interface ICs and gate driver ICs under HS headings 8542 and
description: MOFCOM announced a preliminary affirmative determination in an anti-dumping investigation covering interface ICs and gate driver ICs under HS headings 8542 and 8541. Exporters should review country-specific duties when shipping to China.
content_en: MOFCOM announced a preliminary affirmative determination in an anti-dumping investigation covering interface ICs and gate driver ICs under HS headings 8542 and 8541. Exporters should review country-specific duties when shipping to China.
content_zh: 商务部公布了对原产于美国的某些模拟集成电路（包括接口IC和栅极驱动IC，HS编码8542和8541）反倾销调查的初步肯定性裁定。出口商在向中国发货时应审查国别特定关税。

short_description: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) reporting obligations may apply to steel-aluminum embodied exports, including electronics enclosures and heat sinks
description: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) reporting obligations may apply to steel-aluminum embodied exports, including electronics enclosures and heat sinks with aluminum content above threshold levels. Ensure compliance with CBAM reporting requirements for EU-bound shipments.
content_en: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) reporting obligations may apply to steel-aluminum embodied exports, including electronics enclosures and heat sinks with aluminum content above threshold levels. Ensure compliance with CBAM reporting requirements for EU-bound shipments.
content_zh: 欧盟碳边境调节机制（CBAM）报告义务可能适用于含钢铝的出口产品，包括铝含量超过阈值的电子外壳和散热器。确保对欧盟出口的货物符合CBAM报告要求。

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This case highlights the critical need for robust compliance with US export regulations, including Entity List screening and end-use checks.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This case highlights the critical need for robust compliance with US export regulations, including Entity List screening and end-use checks.
content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。此案凸显了严格遵守美国出口法规、包括实体清单筛查和最终用途检查的紧迫性。

short_description: The US Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equi
description: The US Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not involve entities on the BIS Entity List or contribute to China's military modernization. The policy aligns with Section 301 tariff exposure and requires FCC Part 15/18 compliance for wireless-capable semiconductors.
content_en: The US Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not involve entities on the BIS Entity List or contribute to China's military modernization. The policy aligns with Section 301 tariff exposure and requires FCC Part 15/18 compliance for wireless-capable semiconductors.
content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华半导体出口的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关设备的管控。出口商必须证明货物不涉及BIS实体清单上的实体，也不会助力中国军事现代化。该政策与301条款关税风险挂钩，并要求具备无线功能的半导体符合FCC Part 15/18标准。

short_description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring standard export controls for civilian firearms. This reduces licensing burdens for com
description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring standard export controls for civilian firearms. This reduces licensing burdens for commercial exports to the US, but exporters must still comply with baseline BIS regulations and avoid restricted parties.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring standard export controls for civilian firearms. This reduces licensing burdens for commercial exports to the US, but exporters must still comply with baseline BIS regulations and avoid restricted parties.
content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支管制规则，恢复了对民用枪支的标准出口管制。这减轻了向美国商业出口的许可负担，但出口商仍需遵守BIS基本规定，避免涉及受限方。

short_description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items, but US export controls remain stringent for dual-use g
description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items, but US export controls remain stringent for dual-use goods. Ensure compliance with BIS regulations and Entity List screening.
content_en: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items, but US export controls remain stringent for dual-use goods. Ensure compliance with BIS regulations and Entity List screening.
content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制。此变更可能减少某些物项的许可要求，但美国对两用物项的出口管制仍然严格。确保遵守BIS法规并进行实体清单筛查。

short_description: US-bound drones should be screened for FAA Remote ID, registration, and operational compliance signals.
description: Drones and unmanned aircraft systems marketed, imported, or operated in the United States should be checked for FAA Remote ID requirements, registration pathways, operating limitations, labeling/user-documentation expectations, FCC radio authorization overlap, battery safety, and restricted end-use or restricted-party exposure.
content_en: US-bound drones and UAVs should be checked for FAA Remote ID, registration pathways, operating limitations, FCC radio overlap, battery safety, and restricted end-use exposure before import or sale.
content_zh: 进入美国市场的无人机/UAV 应检查 FAA Remote ID、注册路径、运行限制、FCC 无线重叠要求、电池安全及最终用途风险。
source_citation: FAA Remote Identification of Drones / UAS registration guidance

checklist.id: Drone compliance::Confirm FAA Remote ID scope
checklist.desc: Check whether the drone is a standard Remote ID aircraft, requires a broadcast module, or falls into an exception before US import or sale.

checklist.id: Drone compliance::Align FCC and battery evidence
checklist.desc: Match radio module FCC authorization, battery safety/transport evidence, labels, and user documents to the imported model.

short_description: US-bound energy storage systems require battery safety, UL, fire-code, and installation review.
description: Energy storage systems, battery cabinets, and lithium battery systems imported or installed in the United States should be checked for UL 9540/9540A evidence, NFPA 855 / fire-code acceptance, UN38.3 transport documents, hazardous-material handling, local permitting, labeling, and installation documentation.
content_en: US-bound energy storage systems should be checked for UL 9540/9540A evidence, NFPA 855 or local fire-code acceptance, UN38.3 transport documents, hazardous-material handling, labels, and installation files.
content_zh: 进入美国的储能系统应检查 UL 9540/9540A、NFPA 855/当地消防规范、UN38.3、危险品运输、标签和安装资料。
source_citation: UL 9540 / NFPA 855 energy storage system safety baseline

checklist.id: ESS safety::Confirm UL 9540/9540A evidence
checklist.desc: Collect system certification, cell/module test evidence, thermal-runaway data, and model coverage for the imported ESS configuration.

checklist.id: ESS safety::Prepare fire-code and transport file
checklist.desc: Align NFPA/local fire-code documents, installation manual, SDS, UN38.3, packaging, and hazardous-material shipping papers.

short_description: EU-bound optical transceivers and laser telecom modules require CE, RoHS, and laser-safety documentation review.
description: Optical transceivers, laser modules, and telecom optical components placed on the EU market should be checked for CE conformity evidence where applicable, RoHS substance restrictions, EMC safety documentation, laser-product safety labeling such as IEC/EN 60825-1, importer/economic-operator details, and technical-file retention.
content_en: EU-bound optical transceivers and laser telecom modules should be checked for CE technical files, RoHS, EMC/safety evidence, IEC/EN 60825-1 laser labeling, importer details, and record retention.
content_zh: 进入欧盟的光模块、光收发器和激光通信模块应检查 CE 技术文件、RoHS、EMC/安全资料、IEC/EN 60825-1 激光标签、进口商信息和资料留存。
source_citation: European Commission CE/RoHS framework and IEC/EN 60825-1 laser product safety baseline

checklist.id: Optical safety::Confirm laser classification and label
checklist.desc: Confirm IEC/EN 60825-1 laser class, warning label, datasheet, and module marking for the optical transceiver.

checklist.id: EU market access::Collect CE/RoHS technical file
checklist.desc: Prepare CE/RoHS/EMC evidence, EU importer or economic-operator details, declaration files, and retention records.

short_description: Germany-bound EV chargers and wallboxes require CE, grid-interface, calibration, and installation documentation review.
description: EV chargers, wallboxes, and charging stations placed on the German market should be checked for CE/LVD/EMC/RED evidence where applicable, German-language installation instructions, WEEE/BattDG/LUCID overlap, grid-interface or network-operator requirements, calibration/metering obligations where payment or metered billing is involved, and installer documentation.
content_en: Germany-bound EV chargers and wallboxes should be checked for CE/LVD/EMC/RED evidence, German installation documents, WEEE/BattDG/LUCID overlap, grid-interface requirements, metering/calibration obligations, and installer files.
content_zh: 进入德国的 EV 充电器/Wallbox 应检查 CE/LVD/EMC/RED、德文安装资料、WEEE/BattDG/LUCID、并网要求、计量校准义务和安装文件。
source_citation: Bundesnetzagentur / German market surveillance and charging-infrastructure compliance baseline

checklist.id: EV charger::Confirm CE and installation file
checklist.desc: Collect CE/LVD/EMC/RED evidence, model coverage, German-language installation manual, and safety labels.

checklist.id: EV charger::Check grid and metering obligations
checklist.desc: Review grid-interface, network-operator, metering/calibration, WEEE/BattDG/LUCID, and installer documentation requirements.

short_description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This action may lead to increased scrutiny
description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This action may lead to increased scrutiny and potential tariff hikes on Chinese exports, particularly electronics and machinery. Exporters should assess exposure to forced labor allegations and prepare for possible tariff increases.
content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This action may lead to increased scrutiny and potential tariff hikes on Chinese exports, particularly electronics and machinery. Exporters should assess exposure to forced labor allegations and prepare for possible tariff increases.
content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税。此举可能导致对中国出口商品（尤其是电子产品和机械）的审查加强和关税上调。出口商应评估强迫劳动指控风险，并为可能的关税增加做好准备。

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This case highlights the critical need for rigorous compliance with US export regulations, including Entity List screening and Section 301 tariff exposure.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This case highlights the critical need for rigorous compliance with US export regulations, including Entity List screening and Section 301 tariff exposure.
content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。此案凸显了严格遵守美国出口法规（包括实体清单筛查和301条款关税风险）的极端重要性。

short_description: The US Department of Commerce revised license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. E
description: The US Department of Commerce revised license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must align with BIS Entity List screening and Section 301 tariff exposure.
content_en: The US Department of Commerce revised license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must align with BIS Entity List screening and Section 301 tariff exposure.
content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，收紧了对先进芯片及相关设备的管控。出口商必须进行BIS实体清单筛查并评估301条款关税风险。

short_description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring standard export controls for civilian firearms. This reduces licensing requirements fo
description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring standard export controls for civilian firearms. This reduces licensing requirements for commercial exports of non-automatic firearms and related components to most destinations, except for embargoed or sanctioned countries. Exporters must still comply with ITAR and EAR requirements for certain items.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring standard export controls for civilian firearms. This reduces licensing requirements for commercial exports of non-automatic firearms and related components to most destinations, except for embargoed or sanctioned countries. Exporters must still comply with ITAR and EAR requirements for certain items.
content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支管制规则，恢复了对民用枪支的常规出口管制。这减少了向大多数目的地（禁运或受制裁国家除外）出口非自动枪支及相关部件的许可要求。出口商仍需遵守ITAR和EAR对特定物品的要求。

short_description: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This means that any subsidiary, parent, or related company of an
description: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This means that any subsidiary, parent, or related company of an entity already on the list may now be subject to the same export restrictions. For US-bound exports of electronic integrated circuits (HS 8542.31), this increases the risk of inadvertently shipping to a restricted party. Exporters must conduct enhanced due diligence to verify that all parties in the transaction, including affiliates, are not on the Entity List or subject to other BIS controls.
content_en: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This means that any subsidiary, parent, or related company of an entity already on the list may now be subject to the same export restrictions. For US-bound exports of electronic integrated circuits (HS 8542.31), this increases the risk of inadvertently shipping to a restricted party. Exporters must conduct enhanced due diligence to verify that all parties in the transaction, including affiliates, are not on the Entity List or subject to other BIS controls.
content_zh: 美国商务部已将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司。这意味着，任何已列入清单实体的子公司、母公司或关联公司现在可能受到相同的出口限制。对于向美国出口的电子集成电路（HS 8542.31），这增加了无意中向受限方发货的风险。出口商必须进行加强的尽职调查，以核实交易中的所有方（包括关联公司）均不在实体清单上或受其他BIS管制。

short_description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain in pla
description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain in place for dual-use items. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen against the Entity List.
content_en: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain in place for dual-use items. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen against the Entity List.

content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室已发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税。此举可能导致对涉及强迫劳动的商品（尤其是新疆产品）加强审查和进口限制。对美出口商应审查供应链中是否存在强迫劳动风险，并为可能的关税上调做好准备。

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and E
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions. This case highlights the critical need for rigorous export compliance, especially for dual-use semiconductor equipment destined for US-sanctioned entities.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions. This case highlights the critical need for rigorous export compliance, especially for dual-use semiconductor equipment destined for US-sanctioned entities.
content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单规定，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。此案凸显了针对美国制裁实体出口两用半导体设备时，严格执行出口合规的紧迫性。

short_description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufac
description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not involve entities on the Entity List or contribute to China's military modernization. The policy aligns with Section 301 tariff exposure and BIS export controls.
content_en: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not involve entities on the Entity List or contribute to China's military modernization. The policy aligns with Section 301 tariff exposure and BIS export controls.
content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关制造设备的管控。出口商必须证明货物不涉及实体清单上的实体，也不会助力中国军事现代化。该政策与301条款关税风险及BIS出口管制保持一致。

short_description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era rule that had restricted civilian firearms exports, restoring standard export controls. This change reduces lic
description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era rule that had restricted civilian firearms exports, restoring standard export controls. This change reduces licensing burdens for civilian firearms but requires continued compliance with BIS export regulations and entity list screening.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era rule that had restricted civilian firearms exports, restoring standard export controls. This change reduces licensing burdens for civilian firearms but requires continued compliance with BIS export regulations and entity list screening.
content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期限制民用枪支出口的规定，恢复标准出口管制。这一变化减轻了民用枪支的许可负担，但仍需遵守BIS出口管制和实体清单筛查。

short_description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain in pla
description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain in place for dual-use items. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen against the Entity List.
content_en: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain in place for dual-use items. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen against the Entity List.
content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制。这一变化可能减少对叙利亚某些物品的许可要求，但美国对两用物品的出口管制仍然有效。出口商仍需遵守BIS规定并筛查实体清单。

short_description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This action may lead to increased scrutiny
description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This action may lead to increased scrutiny and potential import restrictions on goods linked to Xinjiang or other regions. Exporters should review supply chain traceability and prepare for possible tariff hikes.
content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This action may lead to increased scrutiny and potential import restrictions on goods linked to Xinjiang or other regions. Exporters should review supply chain traceability and prepare for possible tariff hikes.

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This case highlights the critical need for rigorous compliance with US export regulations, including Entity List screening and end-use checks.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This case highlights the critical need for rigorous compliance with US export regulations, including Entity List screening and end-use checks.

short_description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufac
description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that the items are not destined for military end-use or end-users, and comply with Entity List restrictions. The policy aligns with Section 301 tariff exposure and BIS export controls.

Exporters must now demonstrate that the items are not destined for military end-use or end-users, and comply with Entity List restrictions. The policy aligns with Section 301 tariff exposure and BIS export controls.

description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era rule that had restricted civilian firearms exports, restoring standard export controls. This change reduces licensing burdens for civilian firearms exporters to the US, but compliance with BIS export controls and entity list screening remains essential.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era rule that had restricted civilian firearms exports, restoring standard export controls. This change reduces licensing burdens for civilian firearms exporters to the US, but compliance with BIS export controls and entity list screening remains essential.

short_description: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, but US-bound shipments still require BIS screening for dual-use items. Ensure compliance with Section 301 tariffs and F
description: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, but US-bound shipments still require BIS screening for dual-use items. Ensure compliance with Section 301 tariffs and FCC certification for electronics.
content_en: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, but US-bound shipments still require BIS screening for dual-use items. Ensure compliance with Section 301 tariffs and FCC certification for electronics.

description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This action may lead to increased scrutiny and potential tariff hikes on Chinese exports, particularly electronics. Exporters should assess exposure to Section 301 tariffs and forced labor allegations.
content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This action may lead to increased scrutiny and potential tariff hikes on Chinese exports, particularly electronics. Exporters should assess exposure to Section 301 tariffs and forced labor allegations.

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and E
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions. This case highlights the critical need for robust export compliance programs, especially for semiconductor equipment subject to US jurisdiction.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions. This case highlights the critical need for robust export compliance programs, especially for semiconductor equipment subject to US jurisdiction.

short_description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufac
description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not pose a national security risk, with increased scrutiny on end-users and end-uses. This aligns with BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
