Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not pose a national security risk, with increased scrutiny on end-users and end-uses. This aligns with BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关制造设备的管控。出口商必须证明货物不构成国家安全风险，并对最终用户和最终用途进行更严格的审查。这与BIS出口管制和实体清单限制保持一致。

short_description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring standard export controls for civilian firearms. This reduces licensing burdens for com
description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring standard export controls for civilian firearms. This reduces licensing burdens for commercial exports of non-military firearms to the US.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring standard export controls for civilian firearms. This reduces licensing burdens for commercial exports of non-military firearms to the US.
content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支的标准出口管制。这减轻了向美国出口非军用枪支的商业许可负担。

short_description: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This action imposes additional licensing requirements and a pres
description: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This action imposes additional licensing requirements and a presumption of denial for exports, reexports, or transfers of items subject to the Export Administration Regulations (EAR) to these affiliates. Companies must verify that their trading partners are not on the Entity List or affiliated with listed entities, and ensure compliance with BIS export controls.
content_en: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This action imposes additional licensing requirements and a presumption of denial for exports, reexports, or transfers of items subject to the Export Administration Regulations (EAR) to these affiliates. Companies must verify that their trading partners are not on the Entity List or affiliated with listed entities, and ensure compliance with BIS export controls.
content_zh: 美国商务部扩大了实体清单，涵盖被列实体的关联公司。此举对向这些关联公司出口、再出口或转让受《出口管理条例》（EAR）管辖的物项施加了额外的许可要求，并适用推定拒绝。企业必须核实其交易伙伴不在实体清单上或与被列实体有关联，并确保遵守BIS出口管制。

short_description: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. However, US export controls remain strict for dual-use items and ent
description: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. However, US export controls remain strict for dual-use items and entities on the Entity List. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen for restricted parties.
content_en: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. However, US export controls remain strict for dual-use items and entities on the Entity List. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen for restricted parties.
content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制，降低部分物品的许可要求。但美国对两用物品和实体清单上的实体仍保持严格管制。出口商仍需遵守BIS规定并筛查受限方。

short_description: India import entries require HS classification, BCD/SWS/IGST, valuation, origin, and ICEGATE filing consistency.
description: Imports into India should confirm HSN/tariff classification, Basic Customs Duty, Social Welfare Surcharge, import IGST, exemption notification scope, origin, customs valuation, invoice/packing-list consistency, and ICEGATE/Bill of Entry data before clearance.
content_en: India import entries should confirm HSN/tariff classification, BCD, SWS, import IGST, exemption scope, origin, customs valuation, and ICEGATE/Bill of Entry consistency.
content_zh: 印度进口申报应确认 HSN/税号分类、基本关税 BCD、社会福利附加税 SWS、进口 IGST、减免通知适用范围、原产地、完税价格以及 ICEGATE/进口报关单一致性。
source_citation: CBIC / Indian Customs / ICEGATE import procedures and tariff classification

checklist.id: Tariff line::Confirm India HSN and duty layers
checklist.task: Confirm India HSN and duty layers
checklist.desc: Validate HSN code, BCD, SWS, import IGST, exemption notification scope, and applicable entry date before filing.

checklist.id: Bill of Entry::Align ICEGATE entry data
checklist.desc: Align invoice, packing list, origin, valuation, importer IEC/GST details, and product-control evidence with the Bill of Entry.

short_description: India-bound electronics may require BIS compulsory registration or Quality Control Order review.
description: Electronics, IT equipment, power supplies, batteries, solar products, and semiconductor-related equipment imported into India should be checked against BIS Compulsory Registration Scheme and product-specific Quality Control Orders before local sale or use.
content_en: India-bound electronics should be checked for BIS CRS registration, Quality Control Order scope, model coverage, lab testing, marking, and importer/manufacturer evidence.
content_zh: 进入印度的电子产品应检查 BIS CRS 注册、质量控制令 QCO 适用范围、型号覆盖、实验室测试、标识以及进口商/制造商文件。
source_citation: Bureau of Indian Standards compulsory registration and Quality Control Orders

checklist.id: BIS scope::Check CRS/QCO applicability
checklist.desc: Map product type, model, power/radio/battery features, and Indian Standard references against BIS CRS and QCO lists.

checklist.id: Evidence pack::Prepare BIS model evidence
checklist.desc: Prepare test report, model family coverage, manufacturer authorization, marking, and importer records before market release.

short_description: India-bound wireless and telecom equipment may require WPC ETA and/or TEC MTCTE review.
description: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, radio, router, IoT, drone, and telecom products imported into India should be screened for WPC Equipment Type Approval, de-licensed band conditions, TEC MTCTE scope, labeling, and importer documentation.
content_en: India-bound wireless and telecom products should be screened for WPC ETA, de-licensed band conditions, TEC MTCTE scope, labeling, and importer evidence.
content_zh: 进入印度的无线和电信产品应检查 WPC ETA、免许可频段条件、TEC MTCTE 适用范围、标签和进口商文件。
source_citation: WPC Equipment Type Approval and TEC MTCTE requirements

checklist.id: Radio scope::Confirm WPC ETA trigger
checklist.desc: Check frequency bands, transmit power, module approval, de-licensed band conditions, and import purpose.

checklist.id: Telecom scope::Check TEC MTCTE coverage
checklist.desc: Confirm whether the product connects to telecom networks or falls under MTCTE essential requirements.

short_description: India-bound batteries and electronics may require Battery Waste and E-Waste EPR review.
description: Batteries, energy storage systems, electronics, IT equipment, and products containing batteries imported into India should be checked for Battery Waste Management Rules, E-Waste EPR obligations, producer/importer registration, labeling, recycling, and channelization requirements.
content_en: India-bound batteries and electronics should be checked for Battery Waste, E-Waste EPR, producer/importer registration, labeling, recycling, and recordkeeping obligations.
content_zh: 进入印度的电池和电子产品应检查电池废弃物规则、电子废弃物 EPR、生产者/进口商注册、标签、回收和记录保存义务。
source_citation: India Battery Waste Management Rules and E-Waste Management Rules

checklist.id: EPR scope::Check battery and e-waste obligations
checklist.desc: Confirm whether the product or embedded batteries trigger producer/importer registration, labeling, collection, and recycling duties.

checklist.id: Records::Prepare EPR evidence
checklist.desc: Keep importer registration, product category, battery chemistry, quantities, recycling/channelization evidence, and customer documentation.

short_description: AI chips, GPUs, and semiconductor items imported into India require sensitive end-use, SCOMET, and re-export-control review.
description: AI accelerator chips, GPUs, processors, integrated circuits, semiconductor equipment, and advanced computing hardware routed to India should be screened for Indian customs classification, BIS/QCO scope, end-use/end-user sensitivity, SCOMET export-control implications for onward transfer, and foreign-origin re-export restrictions where applicable.
content_en: India-bound AI chips, GPUs, processors, ICs, and semiconductor equipment should be screened for customs classification, BIS/QCO scope, sensitive end use, SCOMET onward-transfer risk, and foreign-origin re-export controls.
content_zh: 进入印度的 AI 芯片、GPU、处理器、集成电路和半导体设备应检查海关分类、BIS/QCO 范围、敏感最终用途、SCOMET 后续转让风险以及外国原产再出口限制。
source_citation: DGFT SCOMET controls, Indian Customs classification, and electronics import compliance baseline

checklist.id: Sensitive item::Confirm AI chip / semiconductor scope
checklist.desc: Confirm performance specs, HS code, ECCN/foreign-origin control notes, and whether the item is an AI accelerator, GPU, IC, or semiconductor equipment.

checklist.id: End use::Screen India end-use and onward-transfer risk
checklist.task: Screen India end-use and onward-transfer risk
checklist.desc: Document consignee, end user, data-center or defense/AI use, SCOMET/onward export implications, and any foreign re-export license conditions.

short_description: India-origin exports require DGFT SCOMET and end-use review for controlled or dual-use electronics.
description: Exports from India should be screened for DGFT SCOMET scope, export authorization, end-use/end-user sensitivity, destination restrictions, re-export conditions, and supporting technical classification evidence before shipment.
content_en: India-origin exports should be screened for DGFT SCOMET controls, export authorization, destination/end-use restrictions, and technical classification evidence.
content_zh: 印度出口应检查 DGFT SCOMET 管制、出口许可、目的地/最终用途限制以及技术分类依据。
source_citation: DGFT SCOMET export-control framework and Foreign Trade Policy export authorization baseline

checklist.id: SCOMET::Screen India export-control scope
checklist.desc: Map product specs, software/technology content, destination, end use, and end user against DGFT SCOMET and authorization requirements.

short_description: India exports require Shipping Bill, HS classification, valuation, drawback/RoDTEP, and export-document consistency checks.
description: Exports from India should confirm Shipping Bill data, HS classification, export valuation, invoice/packing list, IEC/GST identifiers, drawback/RoDTEP/RoSCTL eligibility, and carrier/customs clearance evidence.
content_en: India exports should confirm Shipping Bill data, HS classification, export valuation, invoice/packing-list consistency, IEC/GST data, and incentive eligibility.
content_zh: 印度出口应确认 Shipping Bill 数据、HS 分类、出口估价、发票/装箱单一致性、IEC/GST 信息以及退税/激励适用性。
source_citation: Indian Customs export procedures, ICEGATE Shipping Bill filing, and export incentive baseline

checklist.id: Shipping Bill::Align India export filing
checklist.desc: Confirm HS code, export value, invoice, packing list, IEC/GST data, and incentive declarations before Shipping Bill filing.

short_description: India-origin shipments need origin, FTA, non-preferential origin, and anti-circumvention evidence review.
description: Exports from India should confirm preferential/non-preferential origin, certificate-of-origin support, supplier/manufacturing evidence, transshipment controls, destination-market origin rules, and FTA eligibility where claimed.
content_en: India-origin exports should confirm origin evidence, certificate scope, FTA eligibility, transshipment risk, and destination-market origin-rule alignment.
content_zh: 印度原产出口应确认原产地证据、证书范围、FTA 资格、转运风险以及目的国原产地规则匹配。
source_citation: India Foreign Trade Policy origin documentation and certificate-of-origin baseline

checklist.id: Origin::Confirm India origin evidence
checklist.desc: Keep manufacturing records, supplier declarations, certificate-of-origin support, and destination-market origin-rule evidence aligned with the shipment route.

content_en: The US Trade Representative has initiated a Section 301 investigation into forced labor and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect Chinese exports to the US, particularly electronics and consumer goods. Exporters should review supply chain labor practices and prepare for potential tariff increases.
content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室已发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税。这可能影响中国对美出口，尤其是电子产品和消费品。出口商应审查供应链劳工实践，并为可能的关税增加做好准备。

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and E
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单限制，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

short_description: The US Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equi
description: The US Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not involve entities on the BIS Entity List or contribute to China's military modernization. The policy aligns with Section 301 tariff exposure and requires rigorous end-use verification.
content_en: The US Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not involve entities on the BIS Entity List or contribute to China's military modernization. The policy aligns with Section 301 tariff exposure and requires rigorous end-use verification.
content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华半导体出口的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关设备的管控。出口商必须证明货物不涉及BIS实体清单上的实体，且不助长中国军事现代化。该政策与301条款关税风险一致，并要求严格的最终用途核查。

short_description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing
description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for certain firearms exports to the US.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for certain firearms exports to the US.
content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化可能影响向美国出口某些枪支的许可要求。

short_description: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening
description: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening for Syria-bound shipments.
content_en: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening for Syria-bound shipments.
content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制，降低部分物项的许可要求。此变更可能影响对叙利亚出口的美国出口管制和实体清单筛查。

short_description: AI servers, storage servers, network appliances, UPS/PDU, and cooling units imported into the United States require HS, FCC, energy, and end-use review.
description: Data center and edge-computing equipment imported into the United States should be screened for HTS classification, country-of-origin marking, FCC/telecom exposure, NRTL or electrical safety evidence where needed, energy-efficiency obligations for power equipment, Section 301 or trade-remedy scope, and restricted-party/end-use risk for high-performance compute systems.
content_en: US-bound data center equipment should be checked for HTS classification, origin marking, FCC/telecom exposure, electrical safety evidence, energy-efficiency scope, trade remedies, and restricted-party/end-use risk.
content_zh: 进入美国的数据中心设备应检查 HTS 分类、原产地标识、FCC/电信适用性、电气安全证据、能效范围、贸易救济以及受限方/最终用途风险。
source_citation: US CBP import requirements, FCC equipment authorization, DOE energy conservation standards, and BIS end-use screening baseline

short_description: Industrial robots and automation equipment imported into the United States require customs, machinery-safety, electrical, and control-system evidence review.
description: Industrial robot arms, PLCs, servo drives, CNC controllers, machine-vision systems, and factory gateways imported into the United States should be checked for HTS classification, origin marking, OSHA/NRTL workplace safety expectations, electrical and EMC evidence, FCC exposure for wireless gateways or cameras, and controlled end-use or restricted-party concerns where automation equipment is used in sensitive facilities.
content_en: US-bound industrial automation equipment should be checked for HTS classification, origin marking, machinery/electrical safety evidence, FCC exposure, and sensitive end-use screening.
content_zh: 进入美国的工业自动化设备应检查 HTS 分类、原产地标识、机械/电气安全证据、FCC 适用性以及敏感最终用途筛查。
source_citation: US CBP import procedures, OSHA/NRTL workplace safety framework, FCC equipment authorization, and BIS end-use screening baseline

short_description: Patient monitors, lab analyzers, and medical electronics imported into the United States require FDA device, listing, labeling, and entry review.
description: Healthcare and lab electronics imported into the United States should be screened for FDA medical-device classification, establishment registration, device listing, 510(k) or exemption status, labeling, unique device identification, radiation-emitting electronic product rules where applicable, customs entry data, and importer-of-record evidence.
content_en: US-bound healthcare and lab electronics should be checked for FDA device classification, registration/listing, 510(k) or exemption status, labeling, UDI, entry data, and importer evidence.
content_zh: 进入美国的医疗和实验室电子产品应检查 FDA 医疗器械分类、注册/列名、510(k) 或豁免状态、标签、UDI、进口申报数据和进口商证据。
source_citation: US FDA medical device import, registration, listing, and premarket requirements

short_description: Germany-origin industrial automation exports require EU dual-use, BAFA, customs export, and technical-document review.
description: Industrial robots, PLCs, servo drives, CNC controllers, machine-vision systems, and factory automation technology exported from Germany should be checked for EU Dual-Use Regulation scope, BAFA export authorization, destination/end-use/end-user controls, customs export declaration, CE/Machinery technical documentation, and software or technology-transfer limitations.
content_en: Germany-origin industrial automation exports should be checked for EU dual-use scope, BAFA authorization, destination/end-use controls, export declaration, CE/Machinery evidence, and software/technology-transfer limits.
content_zh: 德国原产工业自动化设备出口应检查欧盟两用物项范围、BAFA 许可、目的地/最终用途控制、出口申报、CE/机械技术文件以及软件/技术转移限制。
source_citation: BAFA export control guidance and EU Dual-Use Regulation baseline

short_description: Japan-bound data center equipment requires customs, PSE power-safety, radio/telecom, and importer evidence review.
description: AI servers, storage servers, network switches, UPS/PDU, power supplies, and rack cooling equipment imported into Japan should be checked for customs classification, importer-of-record data, PSE electrical appliance/material scope for power equipment, Radio Act/telecom approval where wireless or network terminal functions apply, and energy-efficiency or labeling evidence where relevant.
content_en: Japan-bound data center equipment should be checked for customs classification, importer evidence, PSE power-safety scope, radio/telecom approval, and energy or labeling evidence.
content_zh: 进入日本的数据中心设备应检查海关分类、进口商证据、PSE 电气安全范围、无线/电信认证以及能效或标签证据。
source_citation: Japan Customs import procedures, METI PSE, and MIC radio/telecom approval baseline

short_description: Japan-bound patient monitors, lab analyzers, and medical electronics require PMD Act, importer, labeling, and QMS review.
description: Healthcare and laboratory electronics imported into Japan should be checked for PMD Act medical-device or IVD classification, MAH/importer responsibility, premarket certification or approval, QMS evidence, labeling, Japanese-language instructions, calibration records, and customs entry consistency.
content_en: Japan-bound medical and lab electronics should be checked for PMD Act classification, MAH/importer responsibility, premarket approval/certification, QMS, labeling, and Japanese instructions.
content_zh: 进入日本的医疗和实验室电子产品应检查 PMD Act 分类、MAH/进口商责任、上市前认证或批准、QMS、标签和日文说明。
source_citation: Japan PMDA / MHLW PMD Act medical device import baseline

short_description: Japan-bound healthcare and lab electronics need Japanese labeling, QMS, calibration, and importer evidence before market placement.
description: Patient monitors, diagnostic devices, laboratory analyzers, IVD equipment, thermometers, wearable health devices, and medical power supplies imported into Japan should prepare Japanese-language labels and instructions, QMS and calibration evidence, MAH/importer records, model-level intended-use documentation, and customs entry consistency before sale or clinical use.
content_en: Japan-bound healthcare and lab electronics should prepare Japanese labels, instructions, QMS/calibration evidence, MAH/importer records, intended-use documentation, and customs entry consistency.
content_zh: 进入日本的医疗和实验室电子产品应准备日文标签/说明、QMS/校准证据、MAH/进口商记录、型号级用途文件和进口申报一致性。
source_citation: Japan PMDA / MHLW medical device labeling and QMS baseline

description: AI servers, storage servers, data center switches, UPS/PDU, power supplies, and rack cooling equipment imported into Korea should be screened for HS classification, KC safety and EMC requirements, RRA radio/telecom approval where applicable, importer labeling, energy-efficiency scope, and controlled end-use or restricted-party concerns for high-performance compute systems.

description: Patient monitors, diagnostic devices, lab analyzers, electronic thermometers, wearable health devices, and medical power supplies imported into Korea should be checked for MFDS medical-device or IVD classification, importer license, product approval or notification, Korean labeling/instructions, KC safety/EMC where applicable, and customs entry consistency.
content_en: Korea-bound healthcare and lab electronics should be checked for MFDS classification, importer license, approval/notification, Korean labeling, KC safety/EMC, and customs entry data.

description: AI servers, GPU servers, storage servers, network switches, UPS/PDU, cooling units, and edge AI boxes imported into India should be checked for HSN classification, BIS CRS/QCO scope, WPC/TEC approval where network or wireless functions apply, BCD/SWS/IGST duty layers, data-center end-use, and foreign-origin re-export restrictions for high-performance compute systems.
content_en: India-bound data center equipment should be checked for HSN classification, BIS/QCO, WPC/TEC scope, duty layers, data-center end-use, and foreign-origin re-export conditions.
content_zh: 进入印度的数据中心设备应检查 HSN 分类、BIS/QCO、WPC/TEC 范围、关税层、数据中心最终用途以及外国原产再出口条件。

description: Patient monitors, medical monitors, diagnostic devices, lab analyzers, IVD equipment, electronic thermometers, wearable health devices, and medical power supplies imported into India should be checked for CDSCO medical-device classification, registration or import license, BIS/QCO overlap, labeling, importer evidence, customs HSN, BCD/SWS/IGST, and post-market responsibility.

source_citation: CDSCO medical device import framework, BIS/QCO, and Indian Customs baseline

short_description: India-bound healthcare and lab electronics require labeling, importer responsibility, post-market, and standards evidence review.
description: Healthcare and lab electronics imported into India should prepare CDSCO registration or import license evidence, Indian labeling and instructions, BIS/QCO overlap review, calibration or performance evidence for lab instruments, importer responsibility records, adverse-event/post-market obligations, and customs HSN/value consistency.
content_en: India-bound medical and lab electronics should prepare CDSCO/import-license evidence, Indian labeling, BIS/QCO overlap review, calibration evidence, importer records, post-market obligations, and HSN/value consistency.

description: Data center and edge-computing equipment imported into Singapore should be checked for TradeNet/AHTN declaration data, GST import treatment, IMDA registration where telecom or wireless functions apply, CPSR/SAFETY Mark exposure for controlled electrical goods, Cybersecurity Labelling Scheme exposure for connected products, and end-use or restricted-party concerns for high-performance compute systems.

source_citation: Singapore Customs TradeNet import baseline, IMDA equipment registration, EnterpriseSG CPSR, and CSA cybersecurity labeling guidance

content_en: Singapore-bound industrial automation equipment should be checked for AHTN classification, GST, IMDA approval, SAFETY Mark exposure, workplace safety evidence, and connected-system cybersecurity risk.
content_zh: 进入新加坡的工业自动化设备应检查 AHTN 分类、GST、IMDA 许可、SAFETY Mark 适用性、工作场所安全证据和联网系统网络安全风险。

content_en: Singapore-bound healthcare and lab electronics should be checked for HSA classification, registration or exemption status, dealer/importer licensing, labeling, intended use, TradeNet consistency, and GST.

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This case highlights strict US export enforcement on semiconductor equipment, requiring thorough compliance with BIS regulations, entity list screening, and end-use checks.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This case highlights strict US export enforcement on semiconductor equipment, requiring thorough compliance with BIS regulations, entity list screening, and end-use checks.

short_description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufac
description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. short_description: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing restrictions on certain items. However, for US-bound exports, standard BIS export controls and entity list scr

short_description: US-bound electronics and battery products should be checked for e-waste, battery recycling, and state stewardship obligations.
description: Electronics, IT equipment, data-center hardware, chargers, batteries, and battery-powered products placed into the United States should be checked for end-of-life electronics recycling expectations, battery handling or universal-waste obligations, state e-waste stewardship rules, labeling, and recycler evidence where commercial programs require documentation.
content_en: US-bound electronics and battery products should be checked for e-waste recycling expectations, battery handling, state stewardship rules, labeling, and recycler evidence.

source_citation: US EPA electronics recycling and universal waste battery guidance

checklist.id: E-waste scope::Check state stewardship obligations
checklist.desc: Confirm whether the destination state, customer contract, or retailer channel requires electronics recycling registration, take-back, or recycler evidence.

checklist.id: Battery handling::Confirm battery waste treatment
checklist.desc: Review lithium or rechargeable battery handling, labeling, end-of-life collection, and universal-waste evidence where applicable.

short_description: Singapore-bound regulated electrical and electronic equipment should be checked for e-waste EPR and producer responsibility readiness.
description: Electronics, ICT equipment, consumer devices, batteries, chargers, and selected regulated electrical and electronic equipment supplied into Singapore should be checked for e-waste management requirements, producer or importer responsibility, take-back/recycling arrangements, labeling, and record evidence before market placement.
content_en: Singapore-bound regulated electrical and electronic equipment should be checked for e-waste EPR, importer responsibility, take-back or recycling arrangements, labeling, and records.

checklist.id: E-waste scope::Confirm regulated EEE coverage

checklist.id: Recycling evidence::Prepare take-back records
checklist.desc: Keep recycling, take-back, labeling, and importer responsibility evidence aligned with customer and market-placement requirements.

content_en: The Department of Commerce expands the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities, increasing the risk of export restrictions for semiconductor and electronic components. Companies must screen all parties in the supply chain, including affiliates, to avoid violations.

short_description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain strict
description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain strict for dual-use items. For US-bound exports, the easing does not directly affect US import rules; however, exporters should still ensure compliance with BIS regulations and entity list screening.
content_en: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain strict for dual-use items. For US-bound exports, the easing does not directly affect US import rules; however, exporters should still ensure compliance with BIS regulations and entity list screening.
content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制。这一变化可能减少对叙利亚某些物项的许可要求，但美国对两用物项的出口管制仍然严格。对于对美出口，放宽措施不直接影响美国进口规则；但出口商仍需确保遵守BIS法规和实体清单筛查。

short_description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electro
description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronics and other goods to the U.S. and global markets due to supply chain scrutiny. General export compliance baseline applies.
content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronics and other goods to the U.S. and global markets due to supply chain scrutiny. General export compliance baseline applies.
content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国电子产品等对美及全球出口，供应链审查加强。适用一般出口合规基线。

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and E
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单限制，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

short_description: The US Department of Commerce revised license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. E
description: The US Department of Commerce revised license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must align with BIS Entity List screening and Section 301 tariff exposure.
content_en: The US Department of Commerce revised license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must align with BIS Entity List screening and Section 301 tariff exposure.
content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华半导体出口的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关设备的管控。出口商必须符合BIS实体清单筛查和301条款关税风险。

short_description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing
description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for civilian firearms exports to the US.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for civilian firearms exports to the US.
content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化可能影响向美国出口民用枪支的许可要求。

short_description: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening
description: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening for Syria-bound shipments.
content_en: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening for Syria-bound shipments.
content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制，降低部分物项的许可要求。此变更可能影响对叙利亚出口的美国出口管制和实体清单筛查。

short_description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electro
description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronics and other goods to the U.S. and global markets due to supply chain scrutiny.
content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronics and other goods to the U.S. and global markets due to supply chain scrutiny.
content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国电子产品等对美及全球出口，供应链审查风险上升。

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and E
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单规定，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

short_description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufac
description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not involve entities on the Entity List or contribute to China's military modernization.
content_en: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not involve entities on the Entity List or contribute to China's military modernization.
content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关制造设备的管控。出口商必须证明出货不涉及实体清单上的实体，也不有助于中国的军事现代化。

short_description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era rule that expanded export controls on civilian firearms, restoring a more permissive licensing policy. This cha
description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era rule that expanded export controls on civilian firearms, restoring a more permissive licensing policy. This change reduces licensing requirements for non-military firearms exports, but exporters must still comply with ITAR and other applicable regulations.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era rule that expanded export controls on civilian firearms, restoring a more permissive licensing policy. This change reduces licensing requirements for non-military firearms exports, but exporters must still comply with ITAR and other applicable regulations.
content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期扩大民用枪支出口管制的规则，恢复了更宽松的许可政策。这一变化减少了非军用枪支出口的许可要求，但出口商仍需遵守ITAR及其他适用法规。

short_description: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole that allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass export controls. This action tightens restrict
description: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole that allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass export controls. This action tightens restrictions on the export of advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and technology to China, particularly targeting foreign-owned facilities that previously could receive controlled items without a license. Exporters must now ensure compliance with expanded BIS regulations, including entity list screening and end-use checks.
content_en: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole that allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass export controls. This action tightens restrictions on the export of advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and technology to China, particularly targeting foreign-owned facilities that previously could receive controlled items without a license. Exporters must now ensure compliance with expanded BIS regulations, including entity list screening and end-use checks.
content_zh: 美国商务部堵住了外国在华半导体工厂规避出口管制的漏洞。此举加强了对向中国出口先进半导体制造设备和技术的限制，尤其针对此前可无许可证接收受控物品的外资工厂。出口商现在必须确保遵守扩大的BIS法规，包括实体清单筛查和最终用途检查。

short_description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain in pla
description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain in place for dual-use items. Exporters should verify that their products are not subject to BIS restrictions or Entity List prohibitions.
content_en: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain in place for dual-use items. Exporters should verify that their products are not subject to BIS restrictions or Entity List prohibitions.
content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制。这一变化可能减少对叙利亚某些物品的许可要求，但美国对两用物品的出口管制仍然有效。出口商应核实其产品不受BIS限制或实体清单禁止。

short_description: United States import baseline review for audio & video
description: Audio and video electronics entering United States should be checked for customs classification, product safety, EMC or radio approval where wireless functions exist, labeling, warranty/importer information, and recycling or e-waste evidence before sale.
content_en: Audio and video electronics entering United States should be checked for customs classification, product safety, EMC or radio approval where wireless functions exist, labeling, warranty/importer information, and recycling or e-waste evidence before sale.
content_zh: United States Audio & Video 进口基础合规检查：确认HS归类、申报信息、产品安全/无线或EMC证据、标签、环保回收资料，以及必要的许可或受限方筛查。
source_citation: US Customs and Border Protection / FCC market access baseline

checklist.id: Memory scope::Confirm memory type and HS line
checklist.task: Confirm memory type and HS line
checklist.desc: Separate HBM, DRAM, NAND, memory modules, SSD controllers, and finished storage products before relying on one HS line.

checklist.id: Memory evidence::Collect performance and end-use evidence
checklist.desc: Keep bandwidth, density, stack/module configuration, wafer/fab origin, customer, end-use, and re-export evidence with the quote or filing file.

short_description: Memory import review should split HBM, DRAM, NAND, and SSD controller risks before filing.
description: Memory components entering United States, including HBM, DRAM, NAND flash, memory modules, and SSD/storage controller ICs, should be checked for HS 8542.32/8542.39 classification, customs valuation, performance specifications, origin, end-use, importer evidence, and re-export exposure where applicable.
content_en: Memory components entering United States, including HBM, DRAM, NAND flash, memory modules, and SSD/storage controller ICs, should be checked for HS 8542.32/8542.39 classification, customs valuation, performance specifications, origin, end-use, importer evidence, and re-export exposure where applicable.
content_zh: United States Memory Components 进口合规检查：确认HS 8542.32/8542.39 归类、性能规格、原产地、最终用途、进口商资料，以及可能的再出口风险。

next_checks.id: Memory scope::Identify exact memory subtype

next_checks.detail: Separate HBM/HBM3E, DRAM/DDR/LPDDR/GDDR, NAND/flash, memory module, SSD controller, and finished storage media; do not screen all memory as one generic product.

next_checks.id: Memory technical thresholds::Capture bandwidth density and stack data
next_checks.task: Capture bandwidth density and stack data
next_checks.detail: Record bandwidth, capacity/density, stack height, interface, package, controller pairing, and whether HBM or advanced DRAM thresholds may apply.

next_checks.id: Memory origin evidence::Map wafer fab packaging and controller origin
next_checks.task: Map wafer fab packaging and controller origin
next_checks.detail: Document wafer fab, assembly, packaging/test, controller or firmware origin, and whether substantial transformation supports the declared route.

next_checks.task: Screen AI server accelerator and data-center use
next_checks.detail: Confirm whether the memory supports AI servers, accelerators, data centers, supercomputing, military, surveillance, or restricted entities.

next_checks.task: Align importer and valuation evidence
next_checks.detail: Align HS 8542.32/8542.39, customs value, importer of record, technical specs, and end-use statement before filing.

content_zh: Russia Memory Components 出口合规检查：重点确认HBM、高阶DRAM、NAND、SSD控制IC是否触发出口管制、性能阈值、最终用途/用户筛查、受限方和再出口要求。

next_checks.id: Memory scope::Identify exact memory subtype
next_checks.task: Identify exact memory subtype
next_checks.detail: Separate HBM/HBM3E, DRAM/DDR/LPDDR/GDDR, NAND/flash, memory module, SSD controller, and finished storage media; do not screen all memory as one generic product.

next_checks.id: Memory technical thresholds::Capture bandwidth density and stack data
next_checks.task: Capture bandwidth density and stack data
next_checks.detail: Record bandwidth, capacity/density, stack height, interface, package, controller pairing, and whether HBM or advanced DRAM thresholds may apply.

next_checks.id: Memory origin evidence::Map wafer fab packaging and controller origin
next_checks.task: Map wafer fab packaging and controller origin
next_checks.detail: Document wafer fab, assembly, packaging/test, controller or firmware origin, and whether substantial transformation supports the declared route.

next_checks.id: Memory end-use gate::Screen AI server accelerator and data-center use
next_checks.task: Screen AI server accelerator and data-center use
next_checks.detail: Confirm whether the memory supports AI servers, accelerators, data centers, supercomputing, military, surveillance, or restricted entities.

next_checks.id: Memory re-export control::Check re-export and transit exposure
next_checks.task: Check re-export and transit exposure
next_checks.detail: Confirm export-control classification, re-export authorisation, restricted-party screening, transit-country role, and no-workaround evidence before quote routing.

short_description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electro
description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronic products to the U.S. and other markets due to supply chain scrutiny. General high-tech trade baseline applies for non-U.S. destinations.
content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronic products to the U.S. and other markets due to supply chain scrutiny. General high-tech trade baseline applies for non-U.S. destinations.
content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国电子产品对美及其他市场的出口，因供应链审查。非美国目的地适用一般高科技贸易基线。

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and E
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单规定，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

short_description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufac
description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that items are not destined for military end-use or to entities on the Entity List.
content_en: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that items are not destined for military end-use or to entities on the Entity List.
content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关制造设备的管控。出口商必须证明产品不会用于军事最终用途或出口至实体清单上的实体。

short_description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect classific
description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect classification and licensing requirements for certain firearms exports.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect classification and licensing requirements for certain firearms exports.
content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。此变更可能影响某些枪支出口的分类和许可要求。

short_description: The Department of Commerce expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities, increasing the risk of export restrictions for semiconductor and ele
description: The Department of Commerce expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities, increasing the risk of export restrictions for semiconductor and electronics shipments to the US. Companies must screen all parties and affiliates against the Entity List and ensure compliance with BIS export controls.
content_en: The Department of Commerce expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities, increasing the risk of export restrictions for semiconductor and electronics shipments to the US. Companies must screen all parties and affiliates against the Entity List and ensure compliance with BIS export controls.
content_zh: 美国商务部将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司，增加了向美国出口半导体和电子产品的限制风险。企业必须对所有相关方及其关联公司进行实体清单筛查，并确保遵守BIS出口管制规定。

short_description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain string
description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain stringent for dual-use items. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen against the Entity List.
content_en: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain stringent for dual-use items. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen against the Entity List.
content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制。这一变化可能减少对叙利亚某些物项的许可要求，但美国对两用物项的出口管制仍然严格。出口商仍需遵守BIS规定并进行实体清单筛查。

short_description: US-origin HBM and high-bandwidth memory require advanced-computing export-control review before shipment or transit.
description: US-origin HBM, HBM2e/HBM3/HBM3E, and high-bandwidth memory supplied for AI accelerators, data-center servers, or advanced computing should be reviewed for ECCN, destination, end-use, end-user, restricted-party, and re-export controls before route or tax optimization.
content_en: US-origin HBM, HBM2e/HBM3/HBM3E, and high-bandwidth memory supplied for AI accelerators, data-center servers, or advanced computing should be reviewed for ECCN, destination, end-use, end-user, restricted-party, and re-export controls before route or tax optimization.
content_zh: US-origin HBM and high-bandwidth memory require advanced-computing export-control review before shipment or transit.：请确认具体Memory子类、HS 8542.32/8542.39、性能参数、原产地、最终用途、客户和再出口证据。
source_citation: US official semiconductor / strategic goods baseline

Singapore should not be treated as a simple tariff workaround.

short_description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electro
description: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronics and other goods to the U.S. and global markets due to supply chain scrutiny.
content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China's exports of electronics and other goods to the U.S. and global markets due to supply chain scrutiny.
content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国电子产品等对美及全球出口，供应链审查风险上升。

short_description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and E
description: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions. This case highlights the critical need for rigorous compliance with US export regulations, including proper classification, licensing, and end-use screening for semiconductor equipment.
content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions. This case highlights the critical need for rigorous compliance with US export regulations, including proper classification, licensing, and end-use screening for semiconductor equipment.
content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单规定，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。此案凸显了严格遵守美国出口法规的必要性，包括正确分类、许可和最终用途筛查。

short_description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufac
description: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not pose a national security risk, with increased scrutiny on end-use and end-users.
content_en: The Department of Commerce has revised its license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related manufacturing equipment. Exporters must now demonstrate that shipments do not pose a national security risk, with increased scrutiny on end-use and end-users.
content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关制造设备的管控。出口商必须证明出货不构成国家安全风险，对最终用途和最终用户的审查更加严格。

short_description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing
description: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for certain firearms exports.
content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for certain firearms exports.
content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化可能影响某些枪支的出口许可要求。

short_description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain strict
description: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain strict for dual-use items. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen against the Entity List.
content_en: Commerce Eases Export Controls on Syria. This change may reduce licensing requirements for certain items destined to Syria, but US export controls remain strict for dual-use items. Exporters must still comply with BIS regulations and screen against the Entity List.
